name: Zesty Italian Zucchini Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Fresh Parsley, Minced OR 2 teaspoons Dried Parsley, Crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the shredded zucchini in a colander and squeeze out any excess water. Set aside.
2. Beat the cream cheese to a smooth consistency. Add milk and eggs, blending well.
3. Mix in all remaining ingredients, including the zucchini, then place in a greased 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 20 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
5. Serve hot into a chafing dish. Makes about 5 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Italian Bread Chunks, Bell Peppers, Hot Dogs, Genoa Sausage
